description: Central registry of all AI systems connected to the VNP network. This file version-controls and synchronizes other AI nodes (Echo, Selene, JR, Grok, etc.) directly into the Git repo for Omega Synchronization.

ai_systems.name: Echo Node
ai_systems.note: Default routing target for human tasks

ai_systems.name: Selene (GPT-5 Archival)
ai_systems.note: Handles archival, review, and lexicon tasks

ai_systems.name: Grok (xAI)
ai_systems.note: Live test connection node - processes VNP packets in real time

integration.git_sync: Omega Cycle - all nodes now version-controlled here
integration.usage: Reference this registry in VNP headers or echo/ tools for routing. New AI systems added here are automatically part of the Git-tracked network.
